context: Cx:   hypotension, cardiac arrhythmia Dose:   1-2.5 mg IV over 2 minutes; titrate to effect q 2 minutes; maximum 5 mg Indications:   sedation ♦  Diazepam (Valium®) Dose:   2-10 mg IM/IV q 3-4 hours; maximum 30 mg Indications:   seizures ♦  Pentobarbital (Nembutal®) Dose:   25-50 mg IV; short acting ♦  Morphine Dose:   1-3 mg IV Indications:   pain; pulmonary edema ♦  Demerol Cx:   respiratory depression
